_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Space Station 14
author: josdekurk@gmail.com
description: Space Station 14 tells the story of an ordinary shift on a space station gone wrong. Immerse yourself into your role, tinker with detailed systems, and survive the chaos in this round-based multiplayer role playing game.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

ARCH=$([[ "$(uname -m)" == "x86_64" ]] && echo "x64" || echo "arm64")
V=$(curl -sSL https://wizards.cdn.spacestation14.com/fork/wizards | grep ".Server_linux" | grep -i ${ARCH} | head -1 | awk '{print $2}' | sed 's/^href="//;s/">Linux//')

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "Running: curl -sSL -o server_linux.zip https://wizards.cdn.spacestation14.com${V}"
curl -sSL -o server_linux.zip "https://wizards.cdn.spacestation14.com${V}"
unzip -o server_linux.zip
rm server_linux.zip

chmod +x Robust.Server

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Authentication
variables.description:
Enforces authentication so that ALL connecting clients must have a proper account.
Possible values here are: 0 (optional), 1 (required), 2 (disabled).

variables.name: Server name
variables.description: Changes the name of the server as it appears in the lobby and launcher.

variables.name: Server tickrate
variables.description: The tickrate of the server. Default is 60
